summary_en:
Longtime business owner and beloved Park View community leader Romeo Morgan officially endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for Ward 1 DC Council, highlighting her hands-on leadership, support for small businesses, and deep commitment to the community.

For decades, the Morgan family has helped shape the culture, entrepreneurship, and community spirit of Ward 1. Romeo Morgan recognizes Jackie’s hands-on leadership, deep community roots, and commitment to supporting small businesses, families, and longtime residents across the ward.
summary_es:
El reconocido empresario y querido líder comunitario de Park View, Romeo Morgan, respalda oficialmente a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para el Concejo de Ward 1, destacando su liderazgo cercano, su apoyo a los pequeños negocios y su compromiso con la comunidad.

Durante décadas, la familia Morgan ha ayudado a construir la cultura, el emprendimiento y el espíritu comunitario de Ward 1. Romeo Morgan reconoce el liderazgo cercano de Jackie, sus profundas raíces comunitarias y su compromiso con apoyar a los pequeños negocios, las familias y los residentes de toda la comunidad.
title_en: Romeo Morgan Endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for Ward 1 DC Council
title_es: Romeo Morgan Respalda a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para el Concejo de Ward 1
source: Romeo Morgan - Park View Business Owner
